title: scrophularia gypsicola
intro: Scrophularia gypsicola, also known as gypsum figwort, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The health benefits of Scrophularia gypsicola include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce fever, and aid in the recovery from illness. In herbal preparations, it is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
